productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Yellow Polo T-Shirt
description: Composition Green, grey and yellow striped polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar with a buttoned chest placket, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs and theme embroidery on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry falt in shade Warm iron Chuck boredom out of your life, slip into this striped T-shirt from the Oddies collection of peter england and zoom away in style. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this tee offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Add on denims and suede shoes, strap on a classy belt and conquer the world in style.
